message:
feat(core): support subquery in FROM clause (derived tables) for JOIN path (bd-svj0)

Handle TableOrSubquery::Subquery by executing the inner SELECT and using
results as a virtual table source. Queries with subquery sources are now
routed through the fallback JOIN path even without explicit JOINs.
Removes the now-unused resolve_table_name helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
